{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323050736EA0F766995B5F8F6DDB5"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619350363401634585","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"事业型 不怎么在乎女儿的柳如烟"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774018652,"group_id":"7595067270041193496","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx3s2G9IBcxEosDQCgYp5OI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6597c9c61e1947bba4b4df416ed340dc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790624&x-signature=fBS6o4BOFRDawUVTDR6pnp7rmO8%3D","user_id":"723958716445795","user_name":"思思点点@"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"723958716445795","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595067270041193496","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常】+【多女】+【温馨】+【不是绿帽文】+【系统】+【奶爸】
离婚三年的陆晨，在女儿陆小可第一天上幼儿园之时，觉醒了宠女狂魔系统，只要满足女儿各种要求就能获得各种奖励。
从那以后，陆晨化身宠女狂魔，只要女儿想要啥，陆晨都会一一满足。
随着陆晨越来越优秀，身边的女人都对陆晨产生感情。
学校校长：“小可家长，今天有没有时间，我想跟你谈一下小可的事情！
美女前房东：“陆晨，今晚不要弄晚饭，来我这吃就可以！
………
随着周围的女生越来越热情，与陆晨离婚多年的妻子立马不乐意，并向陆晨求复婚。
“陆晨要不我们复婚吧，毕竟小可不能没有母亲，这样对她的童年不好！”
